title: C++ formatting functions should be preferred instead of C printf-like functions
description: In contrast to C printf-like functions, C++ provides safer and more robust interfaces for performing text formatting: The std::format interface family (C++20) allows formatting text into a string. The std::print interface family (C++23) allows printing formatted text. C++ formatting facilities perform validation of the format string against the type of the formatted argument.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Use C++ iostream or std::format instead of C formatting functions.
